import React from 'react'; import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; export default function NfcBusinessCard(){ const navigate = useNavigate(); function onOrder(e){ // Navigate to internal OrderCard page which posts to backend (or could redirect to external) navigate('/order-card'); } return (

Smart NFC Business Card

A modern NFC-enabled business card that shares your dynamic profile with a tap.

How it works

  • Tap the card with a phone to open your profile
  • Works on iOS & Android without an app
  • Reusable & updateable — change content anytime

Design examples

Pricing

Starting at $29 for a single card. Discounts for teams.

Request a card
); }
